Class InventoryDao

java.lang.Object
InventoryDao
public final class InventoryDao extends Object
DAO for inventory data and inventory-based reports.

    Class

    InventoryDao.UsageRow
    Projection row for usage chart results.

    • InventoryDao

      public InventoryDao()

  • Method Details

    • getAll

      public List<InventoryItem> getAll() throws Exception
      Loads all inventory rows ordered by id.
      Returns:
      full inventory list
      Throws:
      Exception - if query fails

    • setQuantity

      public void setQuantity(int id, int qty) throws Exception
      Sets the absolute quantity for one inventory row.
      Parameters:
      id - inventory id
      qty - new quantity value
      Throws:
      Exception - if update fails

    • addQuantity

      public void addQuantity(int id, int delta) throws Exception
      Adds a delta to the current inventory quantity.
      Parameters:
      id - inventory id
      delta - quantity increment (negative values decrement)
      Throws:
      Exception - if update fails

    • inventoryReport

      public List<String[]> inventoryReport()
      Produces a simple inventory report sorted by stock ascending.
      Returns:
      report rows [name, quantity]

    • usageByInventoryItem

      public List<InventoryDao.UsageRow> usageByInventoryItem(LocalDate start, LocalDate end) throws Exception
      Computes total inventory usage between two dates (inclusive).
      Parameters:
      start - start date
      end - end date
      Returns:
      usage rows ordered by most used first
      Throws:
      Exception - if query fails
